items.name: 三匹獅子舞
items.description: 五穀豊穣・悪霊退散を祈って奉納される三匹獅子舞。

en.description_en: Folk cultural property (intangible folk cultural property). Village-designated by Iitate Village. Located in the Hiso and Kusano districts.

items.name: 常念寺のイチョウ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.location: 相馬郡飯舘村二枚橋字本町285（常念寺）
items.description: 樹齢約250年のイチョウ。福島県緑の文化財にも登録。

en.description_en: Natural monument among the monuments (historic sites, places of scenic beauty and natural monuments). Village-designated by Iitate Village. Located at Aza Honmachi 285, Nimaibashi, Iitate Village, Soma District (Jonenji Temple).
